summary: Comprehensive testing of User Account Dashboard features for UAE e-commerce platform. All features working correctly: customer login redirects to /account, admin login redirects to /admin, profile management with edit functionality, My Orders tab with status filters and empty state, Admin Panel link for admin users, Sign Out functionality.
passed_tests: Customer login with testcustomer@test.com / test123 works correctly
Admin login with admin@gpgt.ae / admin123 works correctly
Admin can access /account via user icon in header
Account page shows Profile tab with user info (name, email, phone, member since)
Account page Edit button allows profile updates (name, phone)
Profile update shows success toast 'Profile updated successfully'
My Orders tab shows order list with status filters (All, Pending, Confirmed, Processing, Shipped, Delivered)
My Orders shows 'No Orders Found' empty state for new users with 'Start Shopping' button
Admin account page shows 'Admin Panel' link in sidebar
Sign Out button in sidebar works correctly - redirects to login page with success toast
Header user icon links to /account for all logged-in users
PUT /api/users/profile endpoint works for profile updates
GET /api/orders endpoint returns user orders with pagination
GET /api/auth/me endpoint returns current user data
critical_code_review_comments: AccountPage.js well-structured with separate components for ProfileSection and OrdersSection
Profile edit mode properly toggles between view and edit states
Status filters in My Orders tab correctly filter orders by status
Admin Panel link conditionally rendered only for admin users (user.role === 'admin')
Header.js correctly links user icon to /account for all logged-in users
LoginPage correctly redirects based on user role (admin -> /admin, customer -> /account)
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Account Dashboard fully implemented and tested. Features include: Profile management with edit functionality, My Orders tab with status filters, Admin Panel link for admin users, Sign Out functionality. All backend APIs working correctly: PUT /api/users/profile, GET /api/orders, GET /api/auth/me. Login redirects work correctly based on user role.

features_verified.admin_access_account: PASS - Admin can access /account via user icon
features_verified.profile_tab: PASS - Shows name, email, phone, member since
features_verified.profile_edit: PASS - Edit button allows updating name and phone
features_verified.my_orders_tab: PASS - Shows orders with status filters
features_verified.my_orders_empty_state: PASS - Shows 'No Orders Found' for new users
features_verified.admin_panel_link: PASS - Visible in sidebar for admin users only
features_verified.sign_out: PASS - Works correctly with success toast
features_verified.header_user_icon: PASS - Links to /account for all users
